---
engine: julia
julia:
  env:
    - "JULIA_PYTHONCALL_EXE=@venv"
    - "JULIA_CONDAPKG_BACKEND=Null"
    - "PYTHONPATH=../../../.."
    - "NO_COLOR=1"
---

```{julia}
import PythonCall
```

```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path

repo_root = next(
    path
    for path in (Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents)
    if (path / "books" / "assets" / "reading_lab_display.py").is_file()
)
if str(repo_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(repo_root))

from books.assets.reading_lab_display import display
```

# 新型向量空间的基、秩 1 矩阵和小世界图

[什么叫标准基](../appendices/11.qmd#什么叫标准基)

[如何在 rref 上看出特殊解](../appendices/11.qmd#如何在-rref-上看出特殊解)

```{python}
#| output: asis

from sympy import Matrix
from books.assets.reading_lab_display import display

A = Matrix([[1, 1, 1, 1]])

display("A.nullspace", *A.nullspace())
display("A.columnspace", *A.columnspace())
display("A.rowspace", *A.rowspace())
display("A.T.nullspace", A.T.nullspace())
```
